channel.title: SPL - Capitol Hill Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Capitol Hill Branch

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Family CRAFT-ernoon
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Families are invited to join us in making simple crafts.

Event details

item.title: Queer Movie Club: "Egghead & Twinkie"
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for an LGBTQ+ film and discussion.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Brick Buddies
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Young children and their families are invited to join our drop-in play group with Lego bricks, Picasso tiles, and other building sets.

Event details
